prompt: Enhanced landscape photograph of a stunning green mountain valley farm in golden afternoon light. Lush rolling meadows in the foreground densely covered with wildflowers — bright red poppies, white daisies, yellow buttercups. A rustic wooden farm fence with weathered posts runs across the left foreground. A charming farmhouse with a warm red-orange roof sits nestled in the mid-ground among mature deciduous trees. Beyond it, dramatic snow-capped mountain peaks rise under a vivid blue sky dotted with natural cumulus clouds. A small wooden sign near the fence post reads 'Vivi农场' in carved letters. Crystal clear afternoon light, long soft shadows across the meadow, warm golden haze. Shot on Nikon Z9, 24mm f/8 wide angle, ISO 100, golden hour, everything in crisp focus from foreground flowers to mountain peaks. Hyper-detailed landscape, vibrant natural color palette, National Geographic quality. Do not add people or animals.
negative_prompt: cartoon, illustration, 3D render, CGI, digital painting, oversaturated, unnatural colors, flat art, dark, gloomy, blurry, low quality, industrial, urban buildings, people
